claim: Evidence schema, prompt, readiness contract, and tests all distinguish project, external, user, and unknown evidence scopes.

evidence.summary: VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES set defines four valid evidence scopes: project, external, user, unknown
DEMAND_EVIDENCE_RESULT_SCHEMA_DEFINITION explicitly requires evidence records with scope, source, and optional path/url fields
evidence.why: Evidence schema definition enforces scope structure

evidence.summary: DEMAND_EVIDENCE_AGENT_PROTOCOLS defines explorer, cross-checker, and verifier with writes_code=false and explicit prompts
evidence.why: Agent protocols enforce non-mutation and scope-aware evidence gathering

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordScope function classifies evidence by explicit scope declaration, then URL detection, then source field keywords
evidence.why: Scope classification logic distinguishes project from external evidence

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordHasDeclaredScope and evidenceRecordHasProjectLocator validate project-scope requirements
evidence.why: Project evidence validation checks for concrete locators

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues function blocks when project-scope lacks path or when non-project scope is used for existing-project facts
evidence.why: Readiness contract enforces project-scoped evidence requirements

evidence.summary: isNonMissingStatusItem and actionableMissingItems filter out status-only notes like 'no missing data identified' from blocking readiness
evidence.why: Missing array handling distinguishes status from blockers

evidence.summary: Test: external-only evidence cannot satisfy existing project facts, with externalEvidence mock and PROJECT_FACT_REQUIRES_PROJECT_EVIDENCE blocker
evidence.why: Test validates external evidence cannot substitute project facts

evidence.summary: Test: project evidence requires a concrete project locator, with locatorlessProjectEvidence mock and PROJECT_EVIDENCE_PATH_REQUIRED blocker
evidence.why: Test validates project evidence must have concrete path

evidence.summary: Test: external URLs cannot be relabeled as project evidence, with mislabeledExternalEvidence mock and PROJECT_EVIDENCE_PATH_REQUIRED blocker
evidence.why: Test validates URL evidence cannot pass as project evidence

evidence.summary: Test: evidence records must declare valid scope explicitly, with scopeLessEvidence mock and EVIDENCE_SCOPE_REQUIRED blocker
evidence.why: Test validates scope declaration is mandatory

evidence.summary: Test: non-missing status notes in missing arrays do not block readiness, with missing=['No missing data identified'] passing prd_ready=true
evidence.why: Test validates status-only notes are not treated as blockers

evidence.summary: Test validates evidence protocols define explorer, cross-checker, verifier and inspectEvidenceAgreement detects conflicts
evidence.why: Test validates evidence agent protocol definitions and conflict detection

risks: Evidence scope classification could fail if agents provide malformed scope or source values
Project evidence validation could be bypassed if path validation logic is incomplete

result.notes: All four evidence scopes are defined in VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES, enforced through evidenceRecordScope classification, validated by projectEvidenceBlockingIssues in readiness contract, and covered by comprehensive tests. Evidence schema requires scope field; agent protocols define scope-aware prompts; tests validate external evidence cannot substitute project facts, project evidence requires concrete locators, scope must be explicitly declared, and status-only notes do not block.
